# Vehicle Code
## Division 1. WORDS AND PHRASES DEFINED [100 - 681]
##### § 223

Any reference in this code to “automobile driver training” shall be deemed to refer to the laboratory phase of driver education described by Section 51852 of the Education Code.

*(Amended by Stats. 1980, Ch. 676, Sec. 305.)*

subsections.text: Any reference in this code to “automobile driver training” shall be deemed to refer to the laboratory phase of driver education described by Section 51852 of the Education Code.
